# MyFood

A website for browsing and ordering junk and fast food.

## Generated by Code Vibe

This project was automatically generated by Code Vibe AI Website Builder.

### Features
- Browse a variety of junk and fast food items.
- Place orders for selected food items.
- Contact form for customer inquiries.
- Responsive design for mobile and desktop.

### Tech Stack
- frontend: {'framework': 'React', 'styling': 'Tailwind CSS', 'language': 'JavaScript/JSX', 'other': ['axios', 'react-router-dom']}
- backend: {'framework': 'Express.js', 'language': 'Node.js / JavaScript', 'other': ['cors', 'body-parser']}
- database: SQLite
